title: Valkyrien Computers
description: A VS2 Addon that adds integratinos for verious computer mods
body:
**This mod is now decommissioned. Its successor is [CC: VS](https://modrinth.com/mod/cc-vs) which adds APIs directly to ComputerCraft computers instead of via peripherals. Other Computer mods will get individual addons later as well.**

Valkyrien Computers is a VS2 addon which adds integration for various computer mods.

Currently, the only integrated mod is ComputerCraft but we plan to include OpenComputers, TIS-3D, Hexcasting, and more!

![Ship Reader methods](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XcEnXRT7/images/573c1265dfce67b9c8ce7be923f0f4de717230e9.png)

![Ship Radar methods](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XcEnXRT7/images/66e33d0fe089dc0ff240026c51dbd1383d69cb10.png)

![Ship Helm methods](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XcEnXRT7/images/e528a631ad6d5e77332973589aed3b28badcd7a2.png)
